name: living-checklist
description: Living Checklist: interactive single-file HTML step-by-step checklists — progress auto-saved, per-item notes, nested subtasks, 5 languages, light/dark themes.

plugins.name: living-checklist
plugins.description: Generate an interactive HTML step-by-step checklist (Living Checklist / 活页清单): single file, double-click to open, progress saved in the browser. Ships two clean default colors (Lapis blue / Burgundy) plus an MX Studio designer skin.
